name: 留白(WhiteWash)
short_description: Relaxing and Healing Hand-Drawn Puzzle Game
detailed_description:
Welcome to the WhiteWash Gallery!

Kitty is a painter who likes to leave white space in her works, and her gallery displays her paintings from a year ago.

A year ago, there were too many colors, too many thoughts and too much work in Kitty's life.

There is an old legend:

"Spirituality is exhausted by repeated work day after day. A spiritually exhausted cat will never be happy."

In order to regain her spirituality, the Kitty begins her adventure.

The "color sprites” in the paintings are like all kinds of things in trivial life, some good and some sad.

The collection of Spirituality requires collecting or eliminating these color spirits in the landscape that changes with the seasons.

The game features 48 levels and 12 classic casual puzzle games, such as Zuma, Match-Three, Bubble Bobble and so on.

Follow Kitty on a year, season, and 12-month adventure!

I hope you, too, can regain your spirituality and happiness like her.

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Traditional Chinese
